10 Scap Pull Ups
15 RDL Empty Bar
15 Bent Over Row Empty Bar
10 Banded Pallof Press
10 Glute Bridge @ 50% DL

strength.name: Deadlift
strength.description:
4x4 | * Shoulders to back pocket
* Crown to Ceiling
* Push the world away | E3MOM 18 mins
BUILD 3 sets
00:00 8 @ 50%
03:00 6 @ 60%
Hold 3 Sets
06:00 4 @ 70%
09:00 4 @ 70%
12:00 4 @ 70%
15:00 4 @ 70%

hypertrophy.reasoning: Deadlifts tax posterior chain heavily; accessory work targets pressing muscles and arms to balance development without CNS fatigue.
